features: ✈️✈️WARM TIPS : When you receive the memory foam found to have air holes, please do not worry about quality issues. Ideal for traveling, at home, watching TV, breastfeeding, reading, sunbathing and relaxing.

✈️✈️ PREMIUM MEMORY FOAM : The 100% memory foam filler provides adequate neck support with advanced 5-second rebound technology, makes the neck pillow can cushion your body and relieve painful pressure points for ultimate relaxation

✈️✈️ LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE :The weight of the package is about 0.55 lbs.The neck support travel pillow was designed for portability and comfort.It comes with a storage bag and it can be compressed down to ⅛ its size and attached to your carry-on luggage without taking up extra space.

description: Product Description Travel Pillow - Memory Foam Neck Pillow Support Pillow Memory Foam Travel Neck Pillow Head Support Soft Pillow for Sleeping Rest, Airplane Car & Home Use Soft & Lightweight Flight Pillow, Ergonomic Neck Cushion With Carry Bag The curved design of the travel pillows are more perfect and better suited to people's necks. It is perfect for sleeping in a seat or standing upright in any type of chair on a long flight. It provides 360° of comfort when sleeping or lying on your back or side. It reduces stress and provides great comfort when travelling, at home, watching TV, breastfeeding, reading, sunbathing The Memory Foam Neck Pillow Support Pillow for Travel by Planes,Cars,Trains or at Home and in Offices Light Weight & Space Saving,The Travel Neck Pillow was designed for portability and comfort, it comes with an portable travel bag that allows the neck pillow to compress down to ½ its size. Step 1: is to start by rolling up one end of the pillow Step 2: Roll it completely into a cylinder shape. Step 3: Put it into the included storage bag. Finally, the storage volume is one half of the original
